title: odontarrhena turgida
intro: Odontarrhena turgida, also known as bitter orchid or bitter gentian, is a perennial plant species native to the mountainous regions of Eastern Asia. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant effects. The plant is believed to have various health benefits, such as reducing inflammation, relieving digestive issues, and boosting the immune system. In herbal preparations, Odontarrhena turgida is often used in teas, infusions, and tinctures, and is also used as a flavoring agent in some beverages due to its bitter taste.
